title: plantago major subsp. cornuti
intro: Plantago major subsp. cornuti, also known as buckthorn-leaved plantain, is a subspecies of the larger plantain plant, characterized by its distinctive buckthorn-like leaves. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Plantago major subsp. cornuti include soothing sore throats, reducing swelling and pain, and aiding in the relief of digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve drying and infusing the leaves in hot water to create teas or infusions, or using the plant in tincture form for more concentrated medicinal purposes.
